parameters.content:
### Before you run this workflow

Create a JustFill API key at https://justfill.app/account and replace the placeholder in **Config**. Open the exact recurring PDF once with a JustFill MCP client, review and name its fields, then save the template; every later run maps JSON deterministically without an AI model.

### 1. Collect the document and values

The form accepts the recurring PDF plus a JSON object. Each JSON key should match a reviewed template field name, for example `company_name` or `invoice_number`.

### 2. Upload the PDF safely

JustFill creates a one-time upload URL, and n8n sends the file as binary multipart data. The workflow never embeds the PDF as base64 inside a JSON-RPC request.

### 3. Reuse reviewed field names

JustFill reuses the saved layout for this PDF. The Code node matches JSON keys to named fields without case or punctuation differences and reports any unmatched keys.

### 4. Fill and return the original PDF

JustFill writes the mapped values into the existing layout and returns a temporary download URL. The final form response redirects the user to that generated PDF.

parameters.formDescription: Upload a PDF that has a saved JustFill template and provide the values as JSON.

nodes.name: Prepare upload
nodes.notes: Parses the MCP upload-slot response and preserves the submitted PDF as binary for the one-time upload.

nodes.name: Map values to fields
nodes.notes: Maps submitted JSON keys to the stable field IDs from the previously reviewed JustFill template.

nodes.name: Result
nodes.notes: Shapes the JustFill response into the temporary download contract used by the final redirect node.
